name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a global money transfer service with thousands of agent locations across Texas, enabling customers to send and receive funds online or in person.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer company that operates through a network of agent locations rather than as a standalone financial institution. The company facilitates domestic and international money transfers, serving customers who need to move funds quickly between locations. With presence across numerous Texas cities—from major metropolitan areas like Houston, Dallas, and San Antonio to smaller towns throughout the state—MoneyGram provides accessible physical locations for customers who prefer in-person transactions over digital-only services.

MoneyGram's core service is money transfer, available through both online platforms and physical agent locations. Customers can send funds to recipients in Texas or receive money at any of their agent locations statewide. The service is designed for convenience, allowing users to quickly locate nearby branches through their interactive map and city-based search tool. The company emphasizes speed and accessibility as key features of their offering.

MoneyGram distinguishes itself through its extensive agent network rather than company-owned branches. This partnership model allows them to maintain a widespread physical presence without operating retail storefronts directly. Their Texas footprint spans rural and urban markets, making them accessible to customers across diverse geographic areas. The emphasis on flexible transaction methods—both online initiation and in-person completion—appeals to customers with varying comfort levels with digital financial services.

A significant limitation of the website content is that it focuses exclusively on location-finding functionality without disclosing fee structures, transfer speeds, exchange rates, or competitive positioning. The website does not provide pricing information, which is crucial for comparing MoneyGram against competitors like Western Union or bank wire services. Customer support details, fraud protection measures, and regulatory compliance information are also absent from this location page. Without transparency on costs and terms, consumers should verify complete pricing before committing to a transfer.
pros: Extensive network across Texas with locations in 200+ cities from Abilene to Zapata
Dual-channel service allowing online initiation with in-person pickup at agent locations
Interactive map and city-search tool making location discovery straightforward
Established global money transfer brand with recognized brand reputation
Physical locations in small towns as well as major metropolitan areas
Same-location send-and-receive capabilities for flexible transaction timing
cons: Website provides no fee, exchange rate, or transfer speed information—critical details for cost comparison
No disclosure of regulatory licenses, fraud protection measures, or customer protections
Agent-based model means service quality and availability depends on third-party locations
Website lacks customer service contact information or troubleshooting support
No competitive pricing comparison or transparency about why MoneyGram should be chosen over Western Union or bank transfers
best_for: Texas residents who need to send money to family members within the state and prefer in-person transactions
Customers without reliable internet access or digital payment accounts who need physical locations
Recipients who want to pick up cash payments at convenient nearby agent locations
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for Texas customers who need accessible money transfer services with multiple physical pickup locations across the state. The primary caveat is that this location page lacks essential pricing and service details—consumers must contact MoneyGram or visit agent locations directly to understand actual fees and transfer timelines before committing to a transaction.
services: In-person fund pickup at agent locations
State and local branch locator service
